en_title: Xbox Says More Exclusives Are Coming But Tells Players Not to 'Overly Fixate on Single-Player' Games
cn_title: XBOX确认将有更多独占，但单机游戏并非固定标准
subtitle: 逐案决定
opus_summary: XBOX高管确认《战争机器：事变日》和《发条革命》并非仅有的计划独占作品，但提醒玩家不要把单机游戏视为固定标准。微软将按个案评估，大型服务型游戏仍会走多平台路线。

paragraphs.en: Executives at Xbox have once again attempted to clarify the company's approach to exclusives, promising that " Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution are not the only titles" it's planning.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX高管再次尝试澄清公司的独占策略，并承诺《战争机器：事变日》和《发条革命》「并非计划中的仅有作品」。

paragraphs.en: Xbox chief strategy officer Matthew Ball and chief content officer Matt Booty tried to further explain how Microsoft is handling exclusives during a conversation with GamesRadar . Their clarification arrived amid the company's renewed interest in the strategy, which kicked off just last month with confirmation that two of its biggest first-party games would not come to PlayStation consoles.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX首席战略官Matthew Ball与首席内容官Matt Booty在接受GamesRadar采访时，进一步解释微软如何处理独占作品。微软最近重新重视这一策略：就在上个月，公司确认两款最重要的第一方游戏不会登陆PlayStation主机。

paragraphs.en: "I can assure you, Gears of War: E-Day and Clockwork Revolution are not the only titles we're planning," Ball promised. "To grow a platform like ours, you have to have exclusive games and services. These are not going to be the only two titles."
paragraphs.cn: Ball承诺：「我可以向大家保证，《战争机器：事变日》和《发条革命》并非我们计划中的仅有作品。要发展我们这样的平台，就必须拥有独占游戏和服务，独占作品不会只有这两款。」

paragraphs.en: Microsoft shocked the industry at its Xbox Games Showcase last month when it declared The Coalition's Gears of War: E-Day would not be releasing on PS5 as many had expected. The announcement that inXile Entertainment's Clockwork Revolution would also be console exclusive arrived sooner after. Both were also confirmed to be pure console exclusives with no timed-exclusivity deals in place .
paragraphs.cn: 微软上月在XBOX游戏发布会上宣布，The Coalition的《战争机器：事变日》不会像许多人预期的那样登陆PS5，令业界震惊。不久后，inXile Entertainment的《发条革命》也宣布为主机独占。两款游戏均确认是纯粹的主机独占，不存在限时独占协议。

paragraphs.en: What's emerged in the weeks since is muddy messaging that's led to some confusion amongst fans. Just as rumors that Xbox had hastily decided to make the Gears prequel exclusive began to dissipate, theories were reignited when the company leaked an image for the game featuring a PS5 logo . Meanwhile, as games like Gears of War: Reloaded, Halo: Campaign Evolved, and Fable come to PS5, players have been left uncertain about how Microsoft will determine what is an exclusive and what isn't.
paragraphs.cn: 此后数周，含糊的信息让粉丝产生困惑。有关XBOX仓促决定让《战争机器》前传独占的传闻刚开始消退，公司便泄露了一张带有PS5标志的游戏图片，再次引发猜测。与此同时，随着《战争机器：重装上阵》《光环：战役进化》和《神鬼寓言》等游戏登陆PS5，玩家愈发不清楚微软会如何判定哪些作品独占、哪些不独占。

paragraphs.en: So, what does the future of Xbox exclusive games look like? For the most die-hard fans – and maybe even Microsoft itself – it's hard to say, for now. In June, Booty said the company will choose which titles get the exclusive treatment on a "case-by-case basis." Today, he's being a tad more direct, promising that, while "large live-service titles" will be multiplatform going forward, players shouldn't expect all single-player titles to be Xbox exclusive.
paragraphs.cn: 那么XBOX独占游戏的未来会是什么样？对最忠实的粉丝——甚至可能对微软自己——而言，目前都很难回答。Booty在6月表示，公司会「逐案」决定哪些作品采用独占策略。如今他的说法更直接：未来「大型服务型游戏」将采取多平台路线，但玩家也不该认为所有单机游戏都会成为XBOX独占。

paragraphs.en: "I wouldn't overly fixate on single-player," he clarified. "I think that's a good rule of thumb, but it certainly isn't something that's carved in stone."
paragraphs.cn: 他澄清道：「我不会过度盯着‘单机’这个标签。我认为这可以作为一个大致原则，但绝不是刻在石头上的铁律。」

paragraphs.en: He continued: "We are the stewards of over 20 game franchises that have made a billion dollars in their lifetime. There are a lot of different games in our portfolio, and we have to think about how different games serve different purposes within it."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「我们管理着20多个生命周期收入达到10亿美元(约合人民币68亿元)的游戏系列。我们的产品组合中有许多不同游戏，必须思考不同作品在其中承担的不同作用。」

paragraphs.en: Ball said Microsoft does "have a framework for these selections, including how we evaluate them." He noted that it's a strategy that may not be "obvious to all of our players," saying the Xbox team is "committed to making this clearer."
paragraphs.cn: Ball表示，微软确实「有一套选择框架，其中也包括评估方式」。他指出，这套策略可能「并非所有玩家都能一眼看懂」，XBOX团队「致力于让它变得更清晰」。

paragraphs.en: As Xbox CEO Asha Sharma brings "energy" to the team, Booty said he's hoping they strike "the right balance between the work that the teams have invested and a strategy pivot." The new gaming boss said in June that exclusives are needed to build a platform . Ball echoed that thought in the new interview.
paragraphs.cn: 随着XBOX CEO Asha Sharma为团队带来「活力」，Booty希望他们能在「团队已经投入的工作与战略转向之间取得恰当平衡」。这位新任游戏业务负责人6月曾表示，建设平台需要独占内容；Ball在新采访中也呼应了这一观点。

paragraphs.en: "There is scant evidence of any platform ever being built, let alone sustained, without having exclusive content," he said. "It doesn't matter whether we're talking about cable networks, streaming video channels, broadcast, terrestrial radio, a Hollywood studio, a music label – you need it."
paragraphs.cn: 他说：「几乎没有证据表明，任何平台能在没有独占内容的情况下建立起来，更不用说长期维持。无论是有线电视网、流媒体视频频道、广播、地面电台、好莱坞制片厂还是唱片公司，都需要独占内容。」

paragraphs.en: We're still in the early days of Xbox's new strategy, so it's tough to say how it will change its troubled ecosystem in the months and years ahead. As the company attempts to clear the air when it comes to its new exclusive strategy, it's still trudging through the aftermath of layoffs that arrived alongside what Sharma called the "most significant restructure" in its history. The resustructure in question, which resulted in , happened earlier this month.
paragraphs.cn: XBOX的新策略仍处于早期阶段，因此很难判断它会如何在未来数月乃至数年改变这个困境重重的生态。公司一边尝试澄清新的独占策略，一边仍在处理裁员后果；这轮裁员伴随着Sharma所称的公司史上「最重大重组」。此次重组于本月早些时候发生，并导致[原文此处缺失内容]。
